## Type of Change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — code change with no feature/fix
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] test — adding or updating tests
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore — tooling, deps, config
- [ ] ci — CI/CD pipeline changes

## Testing

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows Clean Architecture layer boundaries
- [ ] No business logic in controllers
- [ ] Domain entities have no framework dependencies
- [ ] Migration added if schema changed
- [ ] Swagger annotations added/updated
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or env values
- [ ] `org_id` scoping enforced on all tenant queries
